title: henckelia lachenensis
intro: Henckelia lachenensis, also known as Gentianella lachenensis, is a plant species native to the Himalayas, classified under the Gentianella genus in the Gentianaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Henckelia lachenensis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, as well as its potential to reduce fever and treat respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, decoctions, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
